nasb.text: David said to him, “To whom do you belong? And where are you from?” And he said, “I am a young man of Egypt, a servant of an Amalekite; and my master left me behind when I fell sick three days ago.

esv.text: And David said to him, “To whom do you belong? And where are you from?” He said, “I am a young man of Egypt, servant to an Amalekite, and my master left me behind because I fell sick three days ago.

cnv.text: 大衛問他：“你是屬誰的？你從哪裡來？”他回答：“我是個埃及的青年人，是亞瑪力人的奴僕。因為我三天前病了，我的主人就把我丟棄了。

ccb.text: 大卫问他：“你是谁的仆人？你从哪里来？”他答道：“我是埃及人，是亚玛力人的奴仆。三天前，主人因为我患病把我撇弃了。
